title: Fabritized
description: Server friendly modpack with lots of customization
body:
# What is Fabritized?

 Fabritized is a modpack made with Client side fabric mods that mainly bring useful Quality of Life changes.

 
# Why should I pick this over Optifine?

Well, a short answer to that question would be, are you looking for more customization and performance? if yes, then fabric has a lot of client side mods  to offer, and this modpack is just a small portion of all the great mods out there. take shaders for example. yeah, Optifine has shaders, but if you want ## more performance, Sodium + Iris shaders does just that. but if that is still not enough to convince you, just stick to Optifine.

 
# How do I install this?

For installation instructions and MultiMC download [click here](https://github.com/Boingy151/Fabritized/#How-To-install)

 
# What mods does this modpack have?

For a detailed list of every mod included, [click here](https://github.com/Boingy151/Fabritized/#Mods-included-in-this-modpack)

 
# Something isnt working!

Im more than happy to help if there are any problems, feel free to ask :)
